title: hypericum atomarium subsp. degenii
intro: Hypericum atomarium subsp. degenii, also known as Degen's St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antidepressant and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of hypericin and hyperforin compounds. The health benefits of Degen's St. John's Wort include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, as well as its antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Degen's St. John's Wort can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to support mental and physical well-being.
